shipping_methods.name: Standard Shipping (3–5 business days)
shipping_methods.description: Economical ground shipping, typically delivered within 3–5 business days.

shipping_methods.name: Expedited Shipping (2–3 business days)
shipping_methods.description: Faster shipping option for offices that need coffee and supplies quickly.

shipping_methods.name: Overnight Shipping (1 business day)
shipping_methods.description: Premium next-business-day delivery for urgent orders.

products.name: Sierra Office Medium Roast Whole Bean Coffee 5 lb Bag
products.short_description: Balanced medium roast whole bean coffee in a 5 lb bulk bag, ideal for office grinders.
products.long_description: Sierra Office Medium Roast is crafted for all-day drinking in busy offices. A smooth, nutty profile with hints of caramel keeps everyone satisfied without overwhelming intensity. Packed in a 5 lb bulk bag for cost-effective brewing. Also available in smaller sizes, but the 5 lb option offers the best value for medium to large teams.

products.name: Summit Fair Trade Dark Roast Whole Bean Coffee 2 lb
products.short_description: Fair Trade certified dark roast whole bean coffee with free delivery.
products.long_description: Summit Fair Trade Dark Roast delivers a rich, chocolatey cup with subtle smoke and spice. Sourced from Fair Trade cooperatives and roasted in a carbon-neutral facility, this 2 lb whole bean coffee is perfect for espresso drinks or bold drip coffee. Qualifies for free delivery to make stocking the office simple and affordable.

products.name: Harbor Fair Trade Dark Roast Whole Bean Coffee 12 oz
products.short_description: Compact 12 oz bag of Fair Trade dark roast whole beans with free delivery.
products.long_description: Harbor Fair Trade Dark Roast is ideal for smaller offices or teams testing new coffees. This 12 oz whole bean option features a bold, smooth profile with notes of dark chocolate and toasted almond. Fair Trade certified and roasted in small batches, it ships free to keep your coffee program both ethical and cost-effective.

products.name: Lakeview Fair Trade Dark Roast Whole Bean Coffee 1 lb
products.short_description: Smooth Fair Trade dark roast whole bean coffee in a 1 lb bag with free delivery.
products.long_description: Lakeview Fair Trade Dark Roast offers a balanced, low-acidity cup with notes of cocoa and molasses. This 1 lb whole bean format works well for teams that want variety without committing to large bags. Certified Fair Trade and roasted weekly for freshness, it includes free delivery on every order.

products.name: Breakroom Medium House Whole Bean Coffee 1 lb
products.short_description: Everyday medium roast whole bean coffee for small office brewers.
products.long_description: Breakroom Medium House offers a straightforward, approachable cup with mild sweetness and a clean finish. This 1 lb bag is suited for smaller teams or secondary brewers. While it does not include free delivery, it’s an affordable choice for offices that like to rotate blends frequently.

products.name: Downtown Blend Ground Coffee 2 lb
products.short_description: Versatile medium roast ground coffee for drip brewers, in a 2 lb bag.
products.long_description: Downtown Blend Ground Coffee is pre-ground for standard office drip machines, eliminating the need for a grinder. A smooth, crowd-pleasing medium roast with notes of toasted nuts and milk chocolate. Great for teams that want an easy, one-bag solution for daily brewing.

products.name: Morning Bright Ground Coffee 12 oz
products.short_description: Lively medium-light ground coffee in a 12 oz bag for smaller teams.
products.long_description: Morning Bright is a medium-light roast with citrus and honey notes that shines in pour-over or drip machines. Pre-ground for convenience, this 12 oz bag is ideal for smaller offices or teams that like a brighter cup to start the day.

products.name: Heritage Reserve Ground Coffee 1 lb
products.short_description: Premium dark roast ground coffee for offices that prefer a bolder cup.
products.long_description: Heritage Reserve is a premium dark roast designed for discerning coffee drinkers. With deep cocoa, molasses, and subtle smoke notes, it pairs well with milk-based drinks and strong drip coffee. This 1 lb ground coffee is priced slightly higher than standard blends, reflecting its single-origin quality.

products.name: Evening Calm Decaf Ground Coffee 12 oz
products.short_description: Smooth medium roast decaf ground coffee for late-afternoon brewing.
products.long_description: Evening Calm Decaf is a Swiss Water processed medium roast that keeps the flavor but cuts the caffeine. Notes of cocoa and toasted grain make it a comforting choice for late meetings or caffeine-sensitive team members. Pre-ground for drip machines in a 12 oz bag.

products.name: OfficePod Medium Roast Coffee Pods (24-count, Intensity 6)
products.short_description: Medium roast coffee pods with intensity 6 for compatible single-serve brewers.
products.long_description: OfficePod Medium Roast offers a balanced cup in a convenient single-serve format. Intensity level 6 suits most office palates, while the 24-count box keeps the breakroom stocked without taking up too much space. Compatible with most popular pod brewers.

products.name: OfficePod House Blend Coffee Pods (32-count, Intensity 7)
products.short_description: House blend coffee pods with intensity 7 and smooth, balanced flavor.
products.long_description: OfficePod House Blend features a slightly stronger cup with intensity 7, ideal for mid-morning boosts. This 32-count box is great for medium-sized offices. Pods are nitrogen-flushed for freshness and work in most common single-serve brewers.

products.name: OfficePod Bold Roast Coffee Pods (24-count, Intensity 8)
products.short_description: Bold dark roast coffee pods with intensity 8 for stronger brews.
products.long_description: OfficePod Bold Roast is a dark roast pod with intensity level 8 for teams that prefer a stronger cup. Ideal for lattes and cappuccinos made from single-serve machines. This 24-count box fits easily on supply shelves and remains under typical office pod budgets.

products.name: OfficePod Extra Dark Coffee Pods (32-count, Intensity 9)
products.short_description: Extra dark roast pods with intensity 9 for maximum strength.
products.long_description: OfficePod Extra Dark is crafted for those who want the strongest possible cup from a pod machine. With intensity 9 and a smoky, robust profile, it is best suited for smaller groups of strong coffee enthusiasts in the office.

products.name: BaristaPro Office Espresso Machine
products.short_description: Compact office espresso machine with 2-year warranty and programmable shots.
products.long_description: The BaristaPro Office Espresso Machine is designed for shared kitchens and breakrooms. It features dual thermoblock heating, programmable single and double shots, a steam wand for milk drinks, and an integrated hot water outlet. Easy front-loading water tank and auto-clean cycles keep maintenance simple.
products.warranty_description: 2-year limited warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship for office use.

products.name: CaféMax Compact Espresso Station
products.short_description: Fully featured espresso station with 3-year warranty under $400.
products.long_description: The CaféMax Compact Espresso Station combines a powerful pump, quick-heat boiler, and intuitive interface in a small footprint. Ideal for offices that want café-quality espresso, Americanos, and lattes without complex setup. Includes auto-shot volumetrics, cup warming tray, and integrated pressure gauge.
products.warranty_description: 3-year commercial-grade warranty covering parts and labor for standard office use.

products.name: Essential Office Drip & Espresso Center
products.short_description: Combination drip coffee and espresso center with 1-year warranty.
products.long_description: The Essential Office Drip & Espresso Center provides both a 12-cup drip brewer and a compact espresso unit in one appliance. Ideal for small offices that want flexibility without multiple machines. Includes programmable brewing times and a hot plate for drip coffee.
products.warranty_description: 1-year limited warranty for standard office use.

products.name: EcoServe 12 oz Compostable Hot Cups (100-pack)
products.short_description: 12 oz compostable hot cups in a 100-pack for eco-conscious offices.
products.long_description: EcoServe 12 oz Compostable Hot Cups feature plant-based lining and are certified compostable in commercial facilities. The 100-count pack is sized for weekly or bi-weekly restocking in busy offices. Designed to fit most standard 12 oz hot cup lids.

products.name: EcoServe 12 oz Compostable Sip Lids (100-pack)
products.short_description: Compostable sip lids compatible with 12 oz hot cups, 100-count.
products.long_description: EcoServe Compostable Sip Lids are designed to pair with EcoServe 12 oz hot cups and other standard 90mm 10–12 oz hot cups. Made from plant-based materials and certified compostable, they help reduce plastic waste without sacrificing convenience.
products.compatibility_info: Fits EcoServe 12 oz hot cups and most standard 10–12 oz cups with 90mm rim diameter.

products.name: Budget 8 oz Paper Cups (50-pack)
products.short_description: Economical 8 oz paper cups for small hot or cold beverages.
products.long_description: Budget 8 oz Paper Cups offer a low-cost option for occasional coffee or tea service. Ideal for small meetings or visitors, this 50-pack is not compostable but is recyclable in many mixed-paper streams where accepted.

products.name: Standard Plastic Lids Assorted Sizes (100-pack)
products.short_description: Mixed-size plastic lids for 8–16 oz cups, 100-count pack.
products.long_description: Standard Plastic Lids Assorted Sizes include a mix of lids compatible with 8, 12, and 16 oz paper cups. A practical option for offices that keep multiple cup sizes on hand. Not compostable but recyclable in some rigid-plastic programs.
products.compatibility_info: Assorted lids fit most standard 8, 12, and 16 oz paper hot cups.

promotions.name: 10% Off Coffee Orders Over $100
promotions.description: Save 10% on eligible coffee products when your order subtotal exceeds $100 before tax and shipping.

promotions.name: Free Standard Shipping on Orders $75+
promotions.description: Get free standard shipping when your cart subtotal is $75 or more.

promotions.name: $20 Off Select Espresso Machines
promotions.description: Take $20 off qualifying espresso machines when your machine subtotal is at least $300.
